T01_scan_atp_packages.title: Scan ATP packages and capture source corpus
T01_scan_atp_packages.instruction: Goal: build an evidence-backed source corpus about ATP from `/Users/manuelcecchetto/code/atp` so all final copy is technically correct. In-scope: inspect `atp-protocol`, `atp-mcp-server`, `atp-runner`, and `atp-visualizer`; read key READMEs, schema, prompts, and runtime entrypoints; capture concise notes on package role, interfaces, and terminology in one canonical source document. Out-of-scope: writing final project/blog copy or changing this website code. Verification: run `test -f docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md && rg -n "atp-protocol|atp-mcp-server|atp-runner|atp-visualizer|atp_schema.json|claim|complete|decompose|visualizer" docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md`. Expected artifacts: `docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md`.
T01_scan_atp_packages.report:
Completed an evidence-backed ATP source corpus scan across `/Users/manuelcecchetto/code/atp` for the requested packages: `atp-protocol`, `atp-mcp-server`, `atp-runner`, and `atp-visualizer`. I created `docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md` as the canonical source document, summarizing package roles, ATP v1.3 schema invariants, MCP tool interfaces (`atp_claim_task`, `atp_complete_task`, `atp_decompose_task`, `atp_read_graph`), runner execution model, visualizer parsing/refresh behavior, and standardized terminology (`SCOPE`, artifacts, report, lease, status lifecycle).

Memory governance updates were applied in the same node: appended `EVD-018` to `docs/memory/evidence-index.md` and `CHG-018` to `docs/memory/changelog.md`, with required NodeID/date/author/change/status fields and explicit acceptance evidence linkage.

Verification command run (node acceptance):
`test -f docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md && rg -n "atp-protocol|atp-mcp-server|atp-runner|atp-visualizer|atp_schema.json|claim|complete|decompose|visualizer" docs/atp-content/atp-source-corpus.md`
Result: PASS (file exists and all required terms present).

Lint/typecheck commands run before completion:
1. `npm run check` -> PASS (`astro check`, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints)
2. `npm run typecheck` -> PASS (`astro check`, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints)
No autofix phase was needed because checks passed on first run.

Commit-per-node note: attempted to create the required single git commit, but this workspace is not a git repository (`fatal: not a git repository` from `git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree`), so commit creation is blocked by repository state rather than node scope. Per protocol, task is completed with blocker documented.

T02_synthesize_atp_mechanics_brief.title: Synthesize ATP mechanics brief from scanned sources
T02_synthesize_atp_mechanics_brief.instruction: Goal: distill ATP essence and mechanics into a reusable technical brief that will drive both the short project page and long blog post. In-scope: define ATP value proposition, package role map, schema contract essentials, generation path (architect/refiner/decomposer prompts + examples), execution path (runner + MCP claim/complete/decompose), and visualizer role; include a concise end-to-end workflow narrative. Out-of-scope: final public copywriting in site content files. Verification: run `test -f docs/atp-content/atp-mechanics-brief.md && rg -n "Essence|Package Roles|Schema|Generation Flow|Execution Flow|Node Status Lifecycle|Claim|Complete|Decompose|Visualizer" docs/atp-content/atp-mechanics-brief.md`. Expected artifacts: `docs/atp-content/atp-mechanics-brief.md`.

T03_define_multilingual_content_model.title: Define multilingual project and blog content model
T03_define_multilingual_content_model.instruction: Goal: produce an implementation-ready localization model so project/blog body content is truly language-specific (not just UI labels). In-scope: define frontmatter contract for localized entries (including locale field), same-slug translation grouping strategy, fallback rules to `en`, and query behavior for projects index, project detail, blog index, blog detail, tags, and pagination; define migration from current single-source files to locale-specific files. Out-of-scope: writing final ATP project/blog prose. Verification: run `test -f docs/atp-content/atp-content-localization-plan.md && rg -n "locale|translation group|slug|fallback|projects index|project detail|blog index|blog detail|tags|pagination|migration" docs/atp-content/atp-content-localization-plan.md`. T04_implement_locale_aware_content_pipel.title: Implement locale-aware content loading and routing
T04_implement_locale_aware_content_pipel.instruction: Goal: implement the multilingual content model in this Astro repo so each locale route renders its own per-locale project/blog entry with deterministic fallback to English. In-scope: update collection schema and content helpers for locale-aware retrieval, update project/blog route data loading for locale + slug resolution, keep URL structure stable, and migrate current ATP entries to per-locale file naming. Out-of-scope: final translated prose quality pass. Verification: run `npm run check && npm run build && rg -n "locale|fallback|translation" src/content/schemas.ts src/lib/content.ts src/pages/projects/index.astro src/pages/projects/[slug].astro src/pages/blog/index.astro src/pages/blog/[slug].astro src/pages/blog/tags/[tag].astro src/pages/blog/page/[page].astro`. Expected artifacts: `src/content/schemas.ts`, `src/lib/content.ts`, `src/pages/projects/index.astro`, `src/pages/projects/[slug].astro`, `src/pages/blog/index.astro`, `src/pages/blog/[slug].astro`, `src/pages/blog/tags/[tag].astro`, `src/pages/blog/page/[page].astro`, `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.en.md`, `src/data/blog/how-atp-works.en.md`.
T04_implement_locale_aware_content_pipel.report:
Implemented the locale-aware content loading/routing pipeline for projects and blog with deterministic fallback to English, and migrated ATP content entries to locale-suffixed filenames.

What changed
- Schema contract (`src/content/schemas.ts`):
  - Added required `locale` field constrained to `SUPPORTED_LOCALES`.
  - Added required `translationGroup` field with strict `<collection>:<slug>` format validation.
- Content helpers (`src/lib/content.ts`):
  - Added locale-aware resolver utilities:
    - `resolveLocalizedEntries(entries, locale, options)`
    - `resolveLocalizedEntryBySlug(entries, slug, locale, options)`
  - Added collection helpers:
    - `getLocalizedProjects(locale, options?)`
    - `getLocalizedBlogPosts(locale, options?)`
    - `getLocalizedProjectBySlug(slug, locale, options?)`
    - `getLocalizedBlogPostBySlug(slug, locale, options?)`
    - route slug helpers `getProjectRouteSlugs()` and `getBlogRouteSlugs()`
  - Updated `getPublishedProjects` / `getPublishedBlogPosts` to return localized `en`-resolved data in production-safe mode.
- Route data loading updates:
  - `src/pages/projects/index.astro`: now loads via `getLocalizedProjects(locale)`.
  - `src/pages/projects/[slug].astro`: static paths by canonical slugs; detail resolves locale-first then `en`; related projects computed from locale-resolved set and deduped by `translationGroup`.
  - `src/pages/blog/index.astro`: now uses `getLocalizedBlogPosts(locale)` and locale-resolved tag/pagination calculations.
  - `src/pages/blog/[slug].astro`: static paths by canonical slugs; detail resolves locale-first then `en`; related posts computed from locale-resolved set and deduped by `translationGroup`.
  - `src/pages/blog/tags/[tag].astro`: tags/post lists generated from locale-resolved entries.
  - `src/pages/blog/page/[page].astro`: pagination generated and rendered from locale-resolved entries.
  - Localized wrappers under `src/pages/[locale]/...` were aligned with new typed static-path props for slug/tag/page passthrough compatibility.
- Content migration:
  - Renamed/migrated ATP entries to locale-suffixed files:
    - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.en.md`
    - `src/data/blog/how-atp-works.en.md`
  - Added required `locale` and `translationGroup` frontmatter to all current blog/project entries so schema validation passes.

Memory governance updates
- Appended `EVD-021` in `docs/memory/evidence-index.md`.
- Appended `CHG-021` in `docs/memory/changelog.md`.
- These entries include NodeID/date/author/change/status and verification details per governance.

Verification performed
- Lint/typecheck requirements (as configured in this repo):
  1. `npm run check` -> PASS (astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints)
  2. `npm run typecheck` -> PASS (astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints)
- Build verification:
  3. `npm run build` -> PASS (localized routes generated for project/blog index/detail/tag flows)
- Node acceptance scan:
  4. `rg -n "locale|fallback|translation" src/content/schemas.ts src/lib/content.ts src/pages/projects/index.astro src/pages/projects/[slug].astro src/pages/blog/index.astro src/pages/blog/[slug].astro src/pages/blog/tags/[tag].astro src/pages/blog/page/[page].astro` -> PASS

Known limitations / follow-ups
- Fallback indicator UI (showing when a rendered entry is fallback `en` vs requested locale) is not added in this node.
- RSS still uses existing helper path and is unchanged in this scope.

Commit-per-node governance
- Attempted required single commit step.
- Blocker: workspace is not a git repository (`fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git`).
- Per governance, node is completed with explicit commit blocker documentation.

T06_translate_atp_project_short_all_loca.report:
Completed T06 by publishing localized short ATP project content for all required locales and preserving shared slug/group protocol semantics.

What I changed
- Added localized project entries:
  - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.it.md`
  - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.de.md`
  - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.fr.md`
  - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.zh.md`
  - `src/data/projects/atp-protocol.hi.md`
- Each localized file includes:
  - translated `title`, `summary`, and body content
  - `slug: "atp-protocol"`
  - locale-specific `locale` field (`it|de|fr|zh|hi`)
  - shared `translationGroup: "projects:atp-protocol"`
  - consistent ATP terminology and package names (`atp-protocol`, `atp-mcp-server`, `atp-runner`, `atp-visualizer`; claim/complete/decompose)

Additional correctness fix (required to keep translations functional)
- Updated `src/content.config.ts` projects loader with `generateId` based on entry path.
- Reason: adding same-slug locale files with dotted filenames (`atp-protocol.<locale>.md`) produced duplicate content IDs under Astro’s default `glob()` ID generation, causing overwrites and suppressing project detail route generation.
- Outcome: unique IDs per localized file while preserving same cross-locale slug behavior.

Memory governance updates
- Appended `EVD-023` to `docs/memory/evidence-index.md`.
- Appended `CHG-023` to `docs/memory/changelog.md`.
- Entries include required NodeID/date/author/change/status fields.

- Result: PASS (all files present; locale metadata matched).

- Result: PASS (`astro check` with 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints).

3. Typecheck command:

- Result: PASS (`astro check` with 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints).
- Note: a first `typecheck` attempt failed with transient Astro datastore filesystem race (`ENOENT ... data-store.json.tmp -> data-store.json`) due concurrent check execution; reran sequentially and passed.

T09_validate_multilocale_content_readine.title: Validate multilingual rendering and publication readiness
T09_validate_multilocale_content_readine.instruction: Goal: prove the ATP project and ATP blog deliverables are published correctly across all locales with no schema/build regressions. In-scope: run type/content checks and production build, assert generated routes exist for project and blog in `en,it,de,fr,zh,hi`, confirm locale-aware selection prevents duplicate mixed-language listings, and capture QA notes. Out-of-scope: additional copy rewrites beyond fixing blockers found during verification. Verification: run `npm run check && npm run build && for locale in en it de fr zh hi; do if [ "$locale" = "en" ]; then project_path="dist/projects/atp-protocol/index.html"; blog_path="dist/blog/how-atp-works/index.html"; else project_path="dist/$locale/projects/atp-protocol/index.html"; blog_path="dist/$locale/blog/how-atp-works/index.html"; fi; test -f "$project_path"; test -f "$blog_path"; done`. Expected artifacts: `evidence/atp-content-qa.md`.
T09_validate_multilocale_content_readine.report:
Completed T09 by executing multilingual publication QA across `en,it,de,fr,zh,hi`, fixing a build-time publication blocker discovered during verification, and documenting evidence.

What changed
- Fixed multilingual blog content loader ID collisions:
  - `src/content.config.ts`
  - Added `generateId: entryPathId` to the `blog` collection loader so locale variants with shared slugs no longer overwrite each other.
- Added QA evidence artifact:
  - `evidence/atp-content-qa.md`
  - Includes command list, pass/fail outcomes, blocker analysis, and post-fix verification notes.
- Updated shared memory (required governance):
  - `docs/memory/evidence-index.md` appended `EVD-026`
  - `docs/memory/changelog.md` appended `CHG-026`
  - Entries include NodeID/date/author/change/status fields.

Why this was necessary
- Initial acceptance route assertion failed because `dist/blog/how-atp-works/index.html` (and localized equivalents) were not generated.
- Root cause: blog locale files with identical `slug` shared default loader IDs and were overwritten during content sync.
- Applying path-based `generateId` to blog loader aligns behavior with projects loader and preserves all locale entries for route generation.

Verification performed
1. Lint check (required)
- Command: `npm run check`
- Result: PASS (`astro check` -> 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints).

2. Typecheck (required)
- Command: `npm run typecheck`
- Result: PASS (`astro check` -> 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints).

3. Build
- Command: `npm run build`
- Result: PASS.
- Confirmed generated routes include:
  - `/projects/atp-protocol` and `/blog/how-atp-works`
  - `/it|de|fr|zh|hi/projects/atp-protocol`
  - `/it|de|fr|zh|hi/blog/how-atp-works`

4. Required acceptance route assertion
- Command:
  - `for locale in en it de fr zh hi; do if [ "$locale" = "en" ]; then project_path="dist/projects/atp-protocol/index.html"; blog_path="dist/blog/how-atp-works/index.html"; else project_path="dist/$locale/projects/atp-protocol/index.html"; blog_path="dist/$locale/blog/how-atp-works/index.html"; fi; test -f "$project_path"; test -f "$blog_path"; done`
- Result: PASS.

5. Locale-aware dedup/mixed-language listing assertion
- Command executed to verify each locale index contains locale-correct ATP links for project/blog cards:
  - checks `href="/<locale>/projects/atp-protocol"` and `href="/<locale>/blog/how-atp-works"` (or unprefixed equivalents for `en`) appear exactly 3 times each per index page (media/title/action links for one card).
- Result: PASS (`route and listing assertions passed`).

Autofix phase
- Not needed for lint/typecheck (both passed without diagnostics).

Known limitations / follow-up
- None blocking this node scope.

Commit-per-node governance
- Required single commit attempted but blocked: workspace is not a git repository.
- Evidence: `git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree` -> `fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git`.
- Per governance, node is completed with explicit commit blocker documentation.
